name: AnalysisDecomposedNodeLoad
summary: The AnalysisDecomposedNodeLoad class contains information related to decomposed node loads.

constructors.name: AnalysisDecomposedNodeLoad
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisDecomposedNodeLoad class.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects an analysis decomposed node load.

properties.name: AnalysisLoadType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis decomposed load.

properties.name: AnalysisModelName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the analysis model name.

properties.name: AnalysisObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the analysis object.

properties.name: F
properties.summary: Gets or sets the force of the analysis decomposed node load.

properties.name: FatherObject2ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObject2Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: FatherObjectID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the father part.

properties.name: FatherObjectType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the father object.

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the analysis object.

properties.name: M
properties.summary: Gets or sets the moment of the analysis decomposed node load.

properties.name: ModelLoadGroupID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the load group.

properties.name: ModelLoadID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the model load.

properties.name: ObjectAttachedToID
properties.summary: Gets or sets the identifier of the object the load is attached to.

properties.name: ObjectAttachedToType
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the object the load is attached to.
